@@ -80,2 +80,0 @@
-import org.gradle.process.ExecOperations
-

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@

+ * Copyright (c) 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -27,0 +27,6 @@
+boolean isAllTaskRequested() {
+    return gradle.startParameter.taskNames.any { String taskName ->
+        taskName == "all"
+    }
+}
+
@@ -28,1 +34,1 @@
-ext.IS_MAVEN_PUBLISH = Boolean.parseBoolean(MAVEN_PUBLISH)
+ext.IS_MAVEN_PUBLISH = Boolean.parseBoolean(MAVEN_PUBLISH) || isAllTaskRequested()
@@ -78,1 +84,0 @@
-    // Maven Publications
@@ -104,1 +109,1 @@
-        project.tasks.register("modularPublicationJar${t.capital}", Jar) {
+        def modularPublicationJarTask = project.tasks.register("modularPublicationJar${t.capital}", Jar) {
@@ -112,0 +117,5 @@
+
+        // 'all' task should always build the publication.
+        rootProject.tasks.named("all").configure {
+            dependsOn modularPublicationJarTask
+        }
